mission.title: the-update-framework-tuf-: Should we accept metadata that includes unrecognised fields?
mission.description: Should we accept metadata that includes unrecognised fields?. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current the-update-framework-tuf- deployment
steps.description:
Verify your the-update-framework-tuf- version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n the-update-framework-tuf- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=the-update-framework-tuf-
helm list -n the-update-framework-tuf- 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working the-update-framework-tuf- installation.

steps.title: Review the-update-framework-tuf- configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant the-update-framework-tuf- configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n the-update-framework-tuf- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=the-update-framework-tuf-
kubectl get configmap -n the-update-framework-tuf- -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=the-update-framework-tuf-
```
**Description of issue or feature request**:

The current reference implementation will ignore unrecognised fields in a metadata file when loading it. Furthermore, some TAPs (i.e.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Should we accept metadata that includes unrecognised fields?
steps.description:
Please fill in the fields below to submit a pull request.  The more information
that is provided, the better.
Even though, this ADR documents something already implied in the TUF
spec in [document formats](https://theupdateframework.github.io/specification/latest/#document-formats)
it seems better to document this decision clearly so that it could be
referenced and give an explanation why someone can load a metadata file
with additional unrecognized fields.

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n the-update-framework-tuf- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=the-update-framework-tuf-
kubectl get events -n the-update-framework-tuf- --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Should we accept metadata that includes unrecognised fields?" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:

that is provided, the better.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with the-update-framework-tuf- installed or the issue environment reproducible.
